nasb.text: Esther did not make known her people or her kindred, for Mordecai had instructed her that she should not make them known.

esv.text: Esther had not made known her people or kindred, for Mordecai had commanded her not to make it known.

cnv.text: 以斯帖沒有把自己的種族和身世告訴人，因為末底改吩咐她不可告訴人。

ccb.text: 以斯帖没有向人透露过自己的种族和身世，因为末底改吩咐她不要透露。
